snippet.title: KHAD TAINU MAIN DASSA - Neha Kakkar & Rohanpreet Singh | Rajat Nagpal | Kaptaan | Anshul Garg
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg Presents Khad Tainu Main Dassa by Selfie Queen Neha Kakkar & Gabru Rohanpreet Singh.


Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/khad-tainu-main-dassa
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/38SHGnYLRMQJ7MzaU6fkCl?si=zkNqWB2aSbCE3SIwsyuZeQ&utm_source=whatsapp
Amazon Music: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B0953GXNN4?trackAsin=B0953DYCKT&ref=dm_sh_um4vQm72sz4FnZNmRxQP4g4RQ
Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJPNMST6/
YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=QyAUoGoiGPI&feature=share
Saavn: https://www.saavn.com/s/song/punjabi/Khad-Tainu-Main-Dassa/Khad-Tainu-Main-Dassa/MzwvBllqQQY?referrer=utm_medium=whatsapp&utm_source=whatsapp

Singer: Neha Kakkar & Rohanpreet Singh
Music: Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics: Kaptaan
Mixed by Rajat Nagpal 
Mastered by Naweed at Whitfield Mastering, London. 
Recorded by Rahul Sharma assist by Samir Dharap at Studio504 
Guitars & Strokes Shomu Seal
Featuring: Neha Kakkar & Rohanpreet Singh

Producer - Anshul Garg

Director - Agam Mann & Azeem Mann
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
DOP - Shinda Singh 
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
DI Coloring- Onkar Singh 
Art Director - Rajan Art 
Choreographer - John
ADs - Ashish Uppal, Jass Panesar, Ravi Goyal, Prateek Bangia
Production - R S Film Production 
Associate Production - Jogi Productions
VFX - Inside Motion Pictures
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu

For Neha Kakkar: 
Make up: Ritika Vats
Hair: Kimberly Chu 
Stylist: Ruchi Kapoor 

For Rohanpreet Singh: 
Make up: Ritika Vats 
Stylist: Ruchi Kapoor

Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital
TRAVEL PARTNER - PRM HOSPITALITY PVT LTD

Lyrics : 


Tu viaah ton phln hor c ve hor hogeai
Sidha kio ni kehnda maitho bor hogea
Hun kihde tainu khaab laage aoun
Bina love u khe tu laagei soun ve khad tainu main dsa

Hun mainu puchda tu kaun ve khad tainu main dsa

Chalo mummy nu shkiyat teri laun ve khad tainu main dsa

J app kre galti jwaak bann janai
J maitho hoje fer mera baap bann janai
Kde bhola kde tu chlaak bann janai
Shreef kde kde badmash bann janai

App daily check krre mera fon
j main manga lagge nakhre dikhaun
khad tainu main dssa 
Main tere uche uche nakhreee 


J taitho mistake hoje mukkr jani ae
Gusse hoke gaddi vicho uttr jani ae
Main galti na galti j krdean
Chad fir mere sir uppr jani
 ae


Kaptaan change hogi teri tone 
app gora mnu aakhree  brown
khad tainu main dssa


Hun mainu puchda tu kon......

Tere uche uche nakhre chkkan ni khad tainu
main dssan
Mainu tavi mada kehndi teri maa ni khad tainu main dssan
#NehaKakkar #RohanpreetSingh #NehuPreet

snippet.title: Sonu और Tappu को साथ देख Bhide को हुई Tension - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Sonu Ka Surprise
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Watch the full episodes of Sonu Ka Surprise: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7apv3AH-pijBqwwyS_x53aV

We bring to you the specially picked up episodes of "Sonu Ka Surprise". What does this series depict? Sonu who has been out due to something important is not seen in the Gokuldham for quite a long now. How does Tapu Sena manage to fulfill her absence? Watch to find out now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: 
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Mumbai: Cyclone Tauktae turns 'extremely severe', IMD issues orange alert
snippet.description: Gusty winds and rains lashed Mumbai and its neighbouring areas overnight and on Monday as the cyclone Tauktae turned into a very severe cyclonic storm. In view of the cyclone alert, the operations at the city's Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport were suspended from 11am till 2pm. Over 150 incidents of tree collapse were reported in Mumbai and suburban areas. As a precautionary measure, the Bandra-Worli Sea link has also been shut. India Meteorological Department has issued an orange alert for Mumbai, warning of very heavy rains at isolated places with strong winds on Monday as a cyclone is likely to pass close to the Mumbai coast. PM Narendra Modi has also spoken to Maharashtra CM Uddhav Thackeray regarding the current situation.

snippet.title: सनी देओल और जीतेन्द्र की एक्शन मूवी | Majboor | Movie In Part 04
snippet.description:
Retired judge Deenanath lives a happy life with his wife and two sons, lawyer Ravi and inspector Sunil. One day Ravi brings home a poor girl Sharda, rendered homeless after her father's demise. The family likes Sharda and subsequently arranges her marriage with Ravi. But a prisoner named Jankidas arrives on their wedding day claiming to be Sharda's husband. Plot thickens when in a conflict, Ravi gets implicated for the death of his henchman and his brother Sunil arrests him. Watch the movie to find out how their issues resolve.

YOR - 1990
Star Cast - Jeetendra, Jaya Prada, Sunny Deol, Ashok Kumar,  Farha Naaz, Mahesh Anand, Asrani,  Prem Chopra,  Seema Deo, Shakti Kapoor, Kader Khan, Johnny Lever
Director - Rama Rao Tatineni 
Producer - R. Joshi
Cinematographer - V. Durgaprasad
Music Director - Laxmikant Pyarelal
Lyricist - Anand Bakshi 
Screenplay - Iqbal Durrani
Dialogues - Iqbal Durrani
Editor - J. Krishnaswamy (Balu)

snippet.title: Ponniyin Selvan Part 1 பொன்னியின் செல்வன் பாகம் 1 Mr Tamilan TV series Dubbed Review
snippet.description:
ஸ்பார்ட்டகஸ், எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cms3J7yd-PZw6i8yvxvRVsL0 

கேம் ஆப் த்ரோன் எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்:  https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cmvQJVpgEhGHzhWYkIwv-K79 

மணி ஹெய்ஸ்ட், எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்  : https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cmvIDmOkZOfaASz7isTkqQC0 

சூப்பர் நேச்சுரல், எல்லா பாகங்களும் பார்க்க லிங்க்  : https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLF8zf110-cmuUrBMYJqojFflA4u3ccegx

உலக சினிமா உள்ளூர் மொழியில். There are 80 million people who speaks Tamil language. But only half population knows English. How they will taste the world of Hollywood TV Series? as not all foreign language TV series are being dubbed in Tamil. So, We are just reviewing TV series in Tamil language for those Tamil people who don't know English.

In this Mr Tamilan SERIES channel, we will cover the following genre TV Series

Fantasy TV Series
Horror TV Series
Action TV Series
Adventure TV Series
Science-Fiction TV Series
Historic TV Series
Comedy TV Series

If you would like to remove any clips i have used in this video, send a email to slicemind@gmail.com and your clips will be removed immediately. We have invested lot of time and effort to raise this channel. Please don't give copyright strike, instead ask me to remove your clips or raise a copyright claim to get the advertisement revenue. I am happy to give the revenue to you.

snippet.title: Padmaavat | Scene 7 | The Guest Demands | Deepika Padukone | Ranveer Singh | Shahid Kapoor
snippet.description:
Queen Padmavati is happily married to a Rajput ruler until a tyrant Sultan, Alauddin Khilji, enters their life and calls a war on their kingdom due to his obsession with the queen.

Padmaavat is a 2018 Indian Hindi-language epic period drama film directed by Sanjay Leela Bhansali. Based on the epic poem of the same name by Malik Muhammad Jayasi, it stars Deepika Padukone as Rani Padmavati, a Rajput queen known for her beauty, wife of Maharawal Ratan Singh, played by Shahid Kapoor. Sultan Alauddin Khilji, played by Ranveer Singh, hears of her beauty and attacks her kingdom to claim her. Aditi Rao Hydari, Jim Sarbh, Raza Murad, and Anupriya Goenka featured in supporting roles.

#Padmaavat #PadmaavatScenes #RanveerDeepika

snippet.title: Tuktae Cyclone ગુજરાતના કયા કાંઠે ટકરાવાનું છે?
snippet.description:
#cyclonetauktae #CycloneAlert

તૌકતે વાવાઝોડું ગુજરાત નજીક પહોંચી રહ્યું છે. હવામાન વિભાગના જણાવ્યા તૌકેત વાવાઝોડાનો સંભવિત માર્ગ પોરબંદરથી મહુવા વચ્ચે રહેશે. 

હવામાન વિભાગે તૌકતે વાવાઝોડાની દિશા સૂચવતો નક્શો રજૂ કર્યો છે જે અનુસાર વાવાઝોડાની વેરાવળ સાથે ટકરાવવાની શક્યતા વધુ દેખાઈ રહી છે. 

હવામાન વિભાગના જણાવ્યા અનુસાર તૌકતે વાવાઝોડું 18 તારીખના રોજ ગુજરાત સાથે ટકરાશે. આ સમયે પવનની સંભવિત ગતિ 145થી 175 પ્રતિ કલાકની હશે. 

રવિવારે સવારે હવામાનવિભાગે જાહેર કરેલા બુલેટિન મુજબ આગામી 12 કલાક દરમિયાનની  મહત્ત્વની રહેશે, આ દરમિયાન તે અતિતીવ્ર વાવાઝોડામાં ફેરવાઈ શકે છે.

તમે અમારી સાથે જોડાઈ શકો છો : 

Website : https://www.bbc.com/gujarati​ 
Facebook : https://bit.ly/2nRrazj​ 
Instagram : https://bit.ly/2oE5W7S​ 
Twitter : https://bit.ly/2oLSi2r​ 
JioChat Channel : BBC Gujarati 
ShareChat : bbcnewsgujarati

snippet.title: Maharashtra में साइक्‍लोन Tauktae ने मचाई तबाही, 6 लोगों की मौत, हजारों घर ढहे, सैकड़ों पेड़ उखड़े
snippet.description:
महाराष्ट्र में तूफान ताउते के चलते अब तक 6 लोगों की मौत हुई है और 9 लोग घायल हैं। 4 जानवरों की भी मौत हुई है। मुख्‍यमंत्री उद्धव ठाकरे ने तूफान के चलते हुए नुकसान कार्यों का जायजा लिया है। उन्‍होंने तुरंत राहत कार्य तेजी से करने का आदेश दिया है। इस दौरान करीब 13 हजार लोगों को सुरक्षित स्‍थानों पर पहुंचाया गया है। मुख्यमंत्री ने जिला प्रशासन से गिरे हुए पेड़ों, गिरे हुए बिजली के खंभों को तुरंत हटाने और गांवों की ओर जाने वाली सड़कों को भी सही करने को कहा, ताकि यातायात सुचारु हो सके।

localized.description:
Darsh has finally realized that his doubt was Nandini was of no use in the serial 'Aapki Nazron Ne Samjha'.

Watch latest entertainment updates of the day in Saas Bahu Aur Saazish. Watch Saas Bahu aur Saazish (SBS) on ABP News daily at 2:30 PM to know what's happening in Indian television and bollywood industry with Aditi Arora Sawant. snippet.title: LIVE | ഫലസ്തീൻ : അകവും ആകാശവും | Wisdom Students | Solidarity with Palestine
snippet.description:
ജനിച്ചു വളർന്ന സ്വന്തം നാട്ടിൽ അഭയാർഥികളെപ്പോലെ ജീവിക്കേണ്ടി വരുന്നതിനെക്കുറിച്ച് ആലോചിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ടോ ❓

📜📜 അത്തരം ഒരു നാടിന്റെ ചരിത്രവും, വേദനിപ്പിക്കുന്ന ചില യാഥാർത്ഥ്യങ്ങളും ചർച്ച ചെയ്യപ്പെടുന്നു..

"ഫലസ്തീൻ : അകവും ആകാശവും" 

🗓️ ഇന്ന് 
🔖 18.05.2021 ചൊവ്വ 
⏰ രാത്രി 07.30 PM IST

പങ്കെടുക്കുന്നവർ :

🎤 ET Muhammad Basheer MP 
🎤 PN അബ്ദുറഹ്മാൻ അബ്ദുലത്തീഫ് 
🎤 ഡോ. അർശദ് ഖുറൈശി 
🎤 അർശദ് അൽ ഹികമി 
🎤 മുഹമ്മദ് അജ്മൽ C


For more updates, Join:
https://chat.whatsapp.com/BradIxyYaeGAxEHrryWZsx

ഫലസ്തീന് ഐക്യദാർഢ്യം  | ഇസ്രായേലിനെതിരെ  പ്രധിഷേധം  | ഫലസ്തീൻ | ഫാലസ്തീൻ ചരിത്രം | പലസ്തീൻ ഇസ്രായേൽ | ജൂതന്മാർ |സയണിസ്റ് ലക്ഷ്യം | ഗാസ | ഗാസയിലെ അഭയാർഥികൾ | ജെറുസലേം മസ്ജിദുൽ അഖ്സ |പലസ്തീൻ നിരപരാധികൾ | സയണിസ്റ് മർദ്ദനം | ഇസ്രായേൽ കോളനിയലിസം | ജറുസലേം ആരുടേതാണ് | എന്താണ് പലസ്തീൻ പ്രശ്നം | സംഘർഷം  | തകർന്ന കെട്ടിടങ്ങൾ | ഇസ്രായേൽ ഉണ്ടായാതെങ്ങനെ  | വിസ്‌ഡം ഫാലസ്തീൻ പ്രഭാഷണം

snippet.title: Padmaavat | Scene 5 | The Friendly Move | Deepika Padukone | Ranveer Singh | Shahid Kapoor
snippet.description:
Queen Padmavati is happily married to a Rajput ruler until a tyrant Sultan, Alauddin Khilji, enters their life and calls a war on their kingdom due to his obsession with the queen.

Padmaavat is a 2018 Indian Hindi-language epic period drama film directed by Sanjay Leela Bhansali. Based on the epic poem of the same name by Malik Muhammad Jayasi, it stars Deepika Padukone as Rani Padmavati, a Rajput queen known for her beauty, wife of Maharawal Ratan Singh, played by Shahid Kapoor. Sultan Alauddin Khilji, played by Ranveer Singh, hears of her beauty and attacks her kingdom to claim her. Aditi Rao Hydari, Jim Sarbh, Raza Murad, and Anupriya Goenka featured in supporting roles.

#Padmaavat #PadmaavatScenes #RanveerDeepika

snippet.title: Molkki | मोलक्की | Episode 131 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
While Purvi refrains from helping Virendra, Sakshi declares herself to be the Mukhyayini of the village in the Panchayat meeting. Catch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.

#ColorsTV #Molkki

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Purvi, a Molkki Dulhan finds herself in an arranged marriage to Virender, a widowed man twice her age and still in love with his dead wife. Soon, she discovers that she has been “sold” by her father and is merely a clause for the inheritance of his uncle’s land. Will she stand up and fight for her dignity? Will her marital deal blossom into a loving relationship?

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 2424 | 18th May 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http:/a/www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 2424: Tappu Solves The Problem
------------------------------------
  Iyer tries every solution but it fails to remove the color from his face. Just when Iyer gives up, Tappu arrives and assures them that he has a solution. But, Tappu's smart solution does not involve removing the color from his face. He instead suggests using digital technology to do the job and color correct the picture.  

 
About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: Tarak Mehta ka ooltah chashmah funniest episode ever

Episode 2366: Iyer Has A Solution
------------------------------------

Everyone including Champaklal rejoices when Babita reveals that Iyer has a solution to Bapuji's problem. Later, their joy turns into disappointment, as Iyer tells them that he could not get his hands on the solution from the laboratory, as it was out of stock.   
 
About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: 1/2 किलो चिकन मसाला मार्केट सारखी परफेक्ट रेसीपी। करा स्वतःचा बिझनेस, संपूर्ण माहिती
snippet.description:
1/2 किलो चिकन मसाला मार्केट सारखी परफेक्ट रेसीपी। करा स्वतःचा बिझनेस, संपूर्ण माहिती

Hotel food series 1( 1 chicken biryani) :-
https://youtu.be/XvGa6QNbxf8

Hotel food series (Anda    Masala) :-

https://youtu.be/uL0uaXzxLC4


Ingredients / साहित्य -
Serves 4

Marination / मॅरिनेशन 
Chicken / चिकन 1/2 किलो
Fresh curd / ताजे दही 125 gms 
Ginger garlic paste / आले लसुण पेस्ट 1 tsp
Corriender powder / धणे पावडर 1 tsp
Garam masala powder / गरम मसाला पावडर 1/2 tsp
Turmeric / हळद 1/2 tsp
Salt / मीठ 

Special masala / स्पेशल मसाला 

Almonds / बदाम 6
Corriender seeds / धणे 2 tsp
Cummin seeds / जीरे 1 tso
Black pepper / काळी मिरी 6-7
Fennel seeds / बडीशोप 1 tsp
Garam masala powder / गरम मसाला पावडर 1 tsp

Oil / तेल 
Bay leaves / तमालपत्र 3
Cinnamon / दालचिनी 1 inch
Green cardamom / हिरवी वेलची 4
Cloves / लवंग 4-5
Finely chopped garlic / बारीक चिरलेला लसूण 1 tbsp
Finely chopped onions / बारीक चिरलेला कांदा 3 med (200gms)
Tomato puree / टोमॅटो प्युरी 2 med tomatos (150gms) 
Kashmiri red chilly powder / कश्मीरी मिर्ची पाउडर 1 tsp
Salt / मीठ 
Water / पाणी 2cups (400ml)
Fresh corriender / कोथिंबीर 

#1किलोचिकनमसालामार्केटसारखीपरफेक्टरेसीपी
#ढाबाstyleचिकनमसाला
#चिकनमसाला
#masalachicken
#gavaranchickenrecipe
#अर्धाकिलोचिकनमसालामराठी
#chickenrecipeforfoodbusiness
#homemadechickenmasala
#1किलोचिकनदममसाला

snippet.title: Tauktae Cyclone કેવી રીતે ગુજરાત તરફ આવી રહ્યું છે?
snippet.description:
#cyclonetauktae #CycloneAlert

અરબ સાગરમાં સક્રિય વાવાઝોડું તૌકતે ગુજરાત તરફ ધીમે-ધીમે આગળ વધી રહ્યું છે. હાલમાં આ વાવાઝોડું અતિતાકતવર બની ગયું છે જેની પવનની ગતિ 118થી 166 કિમીની છે. 

તૌકતે વાવાઝોડું ગોવા, મહારાષ્ટ્ર થઈને ગુજરાત તરફ આગળ વધી રહ્યું છે. 

ભારતીય હવામાન વિભાગે તૌકતે વાવાઝોડાનો સંભવિત માર્ગ રજૂ કર્યો છે. જે રીતે તમે જોઈ શકો છો એમ જે લીલા રંગનો વિસ્તાર છે એ વાવાઝોડાની સંભવિત દિશા સૂચવે છે. 

નક્શામાં જે લાલ લાઇન દેખાય છે તે વાવાઝોડાનો સંભવિત માર્ગ છે. હવામાન વિભાગના જણાવ્યા અનુસાર તૌકતે વાવાઝોડું પોરબંદરથી મહુવા વચ્ચે ત્રાટકી શકે છે. ત્યારબાદ તે ઉપરની તરફ જતું રહેશે.

તમે અમારી સાથે જોડાઈ શકો છો : 

Website : https://www.bbc.com/gujarati​ 
Facebook : https://bit.ly/2nRrazj​ 
Instagram : https://bit.ly/2oE5W7S​ 
Twitter : https://bit.ly/2oLSi2r​ 
JioChat Channel : BBC Gujarati 
ShareChat : bbcnewsgujarati

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 232
snippet.description:
Truth about Sanskaar and Swara's relationship is revealed to Kavita. Kavita tries to unite Sanskaar and Swara together. Urvashi tries to provoke Maheshwari's against Swara.

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bwL5H8eIQ6w51VWKyjzA0oU

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

Rajasthan के जालोर से प्रवेश करेगा ताऊ-ते तूफान | Latest Tauktae News | Cyclone Tauktae 2021

#TauktaeLive #RajasthanTauktae #TauktaeCyclone

snippet.title: SR : NH54 4 Lane Compensation | 17.5.2021
snippet.description:
NH54/306 Four Lane laih tur, Khamrang to Kawnpui compensation leh a behbawm. Khamrang rama Ghost Town an tih thin hi enge a nihna chiah? 

Kawngpui kama dragon fruit hmun siam thar tam ta em em hi engvange nge?..a hmunah kan bihchiang. 

Kum 1981 atanga din tan Kawnpui Kanan Veng, in 40 awmna chu kawngpui sial vang hian a bo dawn. An inhmun te lah VC pass mai a ni hlawm si, VC pass in land value a nei si lo! Engtin nge ni zel ang le? 

Kan report hi lo thlir ve ngei ang che.

**Official Special Report YouTube Channel**
**Like, Leave a Comment, Share & SUBSCRIBE**

Hemi channel ah hian theih ang angin video upload kan tum anga, SUGGEST duh leh REQUEST duh in neih chuan COMMENT section lamah khuan sawi ni se a lawmawm ang.

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 16 May 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 753 | 17th May 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http:/a/www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 753: Bhide's New Swing
------------------------------------

Bhide is excited about his swing, he chooses to put it in his balcony. Looking at this, Champaklal, Jethalal, and Daya miss their good old days and share stories. Bhide faces trouble in getting the swing fixed. This gets him worked up. Watch this episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Oolta Chasma to see what happens next.   

 
About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: Tarak Mehta ka ooltah chashmah funniest episode ever

snippet.title: Shastri Sisters | शास्त्री सिस्टर्स | Episode 226
snippet.description:
Neil is unhappy as he is compelled to marry Kajal, who is a mere guest in their life. Anushka goes to deliver gifts to Kajal but feels uneasy on sensing her change of attitude. Will Anushka learn the truth about Kajal?

#ColorsRishtey #ShastriSisters

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-by7qIKT8qN8Q2HznvG9k3-k

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

Hailing from a small town in Kanpur, Narayan Shastri's four daughters - Alka, Anushka, Devyani and Peeya, are in for a culture shock as they relocate to Delhi. While coping with their personal struggles, the four sisters learn to live in a big city and yet manage to retain the essence of their small town lives.

snippet.title: Padmaavat | Scene 4 | Deepika Padukone | Ranveer Singh
snippet.description:
Queen Padmavati is happily married to a Rajput ruler until a tyrant Sultan, Alauddin Khilji, enters their life and calls a war on their kingdom due to his obsession with the queen.

Padmaavat is a 2018 Indian Hindi-language epic period drama film directed by Sanjay Leela Bhansali. Based on the epic poem of the same name by Malik Muhammad Jayasi, it stars Deepika Padukone as Rani Padmavati, a Rajput queen known for her beauty, wife of Maharawal Ratan Singh, played by Shahid Kapoor. Sultan Alauddin Khilji, played by Ranveer Singh, hears of her beauty and attacks her kingdom to claim her. Aditi Rao Hydari, Jim Sarbh, Raza Murad, and Anupriya Goenka featured in supporting roles.

#Padmaavat #PadmaavatScenes #RanveerDeepika

snippet.title: Israel Palestine Conflict: इसराइल-फ़लस्तीनी हिंसा पर संयुक्त राष्ट्र में भारत ने की निंदा (BBC)
snippet.description:
संयुक्त राष्ट्र में भारत के दूत टीएस तिरूमूर्ति ने सुरक्षा परिषद की बैठक के बाद कहा है कि भारत यरुशलम और ग़ज़ा में जारी हिंसा को लेकर चिंतित है. भारतीय दूत ने कहा कि "भारत हर तरह की हिंसा की निंदा करता है, तत्काल तनाव ख़त्म करने की अपील करता है." भारतीय दूत तिरूमूर्ति ने कहा, "भारत फ़लस्तीनियों की जायज़ माँग का समर्थन करता है और दो-राष्ट्र की नीति के ज़रिए समाधान को लेकर वचनबद्ध है." उन्होंने कहा, "भारत ग़ज़ा पट्टी से होने वाले रॉकेट हमलों की निंदा करता है, साथ ही इसराइली बदले की कार्रवाई में भी बहुत बड़ी संख्या में आम नागरिक मारे गए हैं जिनमें औरतें और बच्चे भी शामिल हैं जो बहुत दुखद है."

स्टोरी: टीम बीबीसी
आवाज़: नवीन नेगी
वीडियो एडिटिंग: दीपक जसरोटिया

#Israel #Palestinian #Conflict

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

ऐसे ही और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए चैनल सब्सक्राइब ज़रूर करें-
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN7B-QD0Qgn2boVH5Q0pOWg?disable_polymer=true

बीबीसी हिंदी से आप इन सोशल मीडिया चैनल्स पर भी जुड़ सकते हैं-

फ़ेसबुक- https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsHindi
ट्विटर- https://twitter.com/BBCHindi
इंस्टाग्राम- https://www.instagram.com/bbchindi/

Episode 3167 : Bagha's New Startup Idea
---------------------------------------------------------
Bagha and Magan are in the  godown trying to assemble the packages.Jethalal enters the godown and is shocked not to see his office setup. Bagha then explains the situation and tries to pitch a new business proposal to know more watch the full episode.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Snake Eyes Official Trailer (2021 Movie) – Henry Golding
snippet.description:
Every warrior has a beginning. Watch the NEW trailer for #SnakeEyes starring Henry Golding. Uncover the classified origin story only in theatres July 23. 🐍
 
Snake Eyes: G.I. Joe Origins stars Henry Golding as Snake Eyes, a tenacious loner who is welcomed into an ancient Japanese clan called the Arashikage after saving the life of their heir apparent. Upon arrival in Japan, the Arashikage teach Snake Eyes the ways of the ninja warrior while also providing something he’s been longing for: a home. But, when secrets from his past are revealed, Snake Eyes’ honor and allegiance will be tested – even if that means losing the trust of those closest to him. Based on the iconic G.I. Joe character, Snake Eyes: G.I. Joe Origins also stars Andrew Koji as Storm Shadow, Úrsula Corberó as The Baroness, Samara Weaving as Scarlett, Haruka Abe as Akiko, Tahehiro Hira as Kenta and Iko Uwais as Hard Master.
 
#SnakeEyes
https://www.instagram.com/SnakeEyesMovie/
https://www.facebook.com/SnakeEyesMovie/
https://twitter.com/SnakeEyesMovie/

snippet.title: Gaza में जारी Attacks पर OIC में Israel को घेरने आए थे Muslim देश, लेकिन आपस में ही भिड़ गए
snippet.description:
Organisation of Islamic Cooperation की बैठक में फिलिस्तीन के मसले पर इजरायल को घेरने आए मुस्लिम देश आपस में ही भिड़ गए. रविवार को गाजा में Israel के हमले के खिलाफ इस्लामिक देशों के सबसे बड़े संगठन की बैठक बुलाई गई. कुल 57 देश इस्लामिक सहयोग संगठन यानि OIC के सदस्य हैं. इस Emergency Meeting में इजरायल की कड़ी आलोचना की गई और गाजा में फौरन हमले रोकने की मांग उठाई गई. हालांकि, इजरायल को लेकर इस्लामिक देशों की प्रतिक्रिया अलग-अलग रही और बैठक के दौरान इसे लेकर उनके बीच मतभेद भी खुलकर सामने आए. OIC Countries demand to stop Israeli attacks on Gaza and Palestine, appeal to UN Security Council for immidiate intervention to stop air strikes and military actions. Muslim countries having diplomatic relations with israel held responsible during the meeting. 

#OICMeeting #IsraelHamasWar #MuslimsCountries 

Credit: #International | FaridAli/Producer | Deepa/Editor | #TV9D

snippet.title: किसके घर आ गई Tapu Sena? | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Tapu Sena Special
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Comedy: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBIT1FSJW6yTlzqK-31FDWg?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the comedy clips of your favorite show:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLSXTaG1fT0cSiLT_KtMpfLkX7ug1LXUBt

Tapu and his friends have come to meet Pinku or rather find his whereabouts. But to their utter dismay they end up at a different Pinku's house.

About The Show:
----------------------------
Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah is a comedy show inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chashmah' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This show revolves around Gada Family which consists of uneducated Businessman Jethalal Champaklal Gada, Jethalal’s Wife Daya & their naughty Son Tipendra Gada living in 'Gokuldham Co-operative Society' and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. In case of a problem and emergency, Jethalal Gada often rushes to Taarak Mehta to seek his help and guidance as he finds a philosopher in him. The residents of the housing society, help each other find solutions when they face common, real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

#tmkoc #taarakmehta
